features.name: rv_daily
features.description: 1-day realized vol: sqrt(sum of squared intraday 1m log-returns)

features.name: rv_weekly
features.description: mean of RV over the last 5 trading days (HAR weekly aggregate)

features.name: rv_monthly
features.description: mean of RV over the last 22 trading days (HAR monthly aggregate)

features.name: vix_close
features.description: India VIX closing level (option-implied forward vol)
